vocab.example: I much prefer being at the helm because it gives me a sense of autonomy and control over the pace of the journey.

vocab.meaning: vai trò ngồi yên một chỗ/thụ động
vocab.example: I enjoy the sedentary role of a passenger, as it allows me to unwind and gaze out the window without any distractions.
There is something incredibly empowering about being the one to command the road, especially during a scenic road trip.

vocab.meaning: người ngồi sau hay chỉ đạo/góp ý (gây khó chịu)
vocab.example: I try my best not to be a backseat driver when my friends are at the wheel, though it's hard to keep my mouth shut sometimes.
As a passenger, I’m more than happy to take over the navigational duties so the driver can focus entirely on the traffic.
